title: EPAM Auth Library
description: Centralized authentication library with OAuth2, JWT token handling, and session management. Supports multiple identity providers including SAML and OIDC.

title: Payment Processing SDK
description: Unified payment processing SDK supporting Stripe, PayPal, and internal payment gateway. Includes PCI-compliant token handling and webhook verification.

title: Structured Logging Framework
description: Enterprise logging framework with structured JSON output, correlation IDs, and automatic integration with ELK stack. Supports log levels, sampling, and PII redaction.

title: REST API Starter Kit
description: Opinionated REST API starter with Express.js, TypeScript, validation, error handling, rate limiting, and OpenAPI documentation generation.

title: EPAM React UI Components
description: Internal React component library built on Material-UI with EPAM branding, accessibility compliance, and common enterprise patterns (data grids, forms, navigation).
